name: Sex in the Shower Emoitbomb
description: An effervescent shower Emoitbomb inspired by the beloved Sex in the Shower scent — a warm, sensual blend perfect for a Valentine's indulgence, leaving skin moisturised and lightly fragranced.
archive_note: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box; the Emoitbomb format combines emollient oils with an effervescent bomb for use in the shower
nostalgia_angle: Sex in the Shower is a long-running Lush product with a devoted following, and seeing it appear in new formats excites loyal fans
throwback_reference: Based on the classic Sex in the Shower solid perfume and body care range
